name: Tuna Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash mushroom caps and drain on paper towels.
2. Place bread slices in a food processor or blender and process to make fine crumbs.
3. Add tuna, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and parsley; puree until smooth.
4. Add salt and pepper.
5. Place mushroom caps on a microwave-safe dinner-size plate.
6. Microwave at high for 3 minutes, or until tender.
7. Spoon the tuna mixture into the cavities.
8. Microwave at high for 2 minutes, or just until the tuna mixture is very warm.
9. Garnish with capers.
10. Alternatively, you can microwave the caps until tender, let them cool, fill with tuna mixture, and serve cold.
